news.title: Nykaa shares fall as Macquarie forecasts an 18% decline.
news.summary: Nykaa shares fall as Macquarie forecasts an 18% decline.

news.title:
Macquarie maintains 'Underperform' rating on Nykaa, hikes TP to Rs 210.
Previous target price was Rs 150, now raised to Rs 210.
news.summary:
Macquarie maintains 'Underperform' rating on Nykaa, hikes TP to Rs 210.
Previous target price was Rs 150, now raised to Rs 210.

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures' weight to rise by $28M (Rs 2.5B) in MSCI rejig.
The MSCI February rejig takes effect today at 3 PM.
news.summary:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures' weight to rise by $28M (Rs 2.5B) in MSCI rejig.
The MSCI February rejig takes effect today at 3 PM.

news.title:
Nykaa partners exclusively with L'Oréal India to manage Kiehl's operations.
This deal enhances Nykaa's decade-long association with the French beauty giant.
news.summary:
Nykaa partners exclusively with L'Oréal India to manage Kiehl's operations.
This deal enhances Nykaa's decade-long association with the French beauty giant.

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures acquired the remaining 40% stake in Nudge Wellness.
Nudge Wellness is now a wholly owned subsidiary; shares credited as per terms.
news.summary:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures acquired the remaining 40% stake in Nudge Wellness.
Nudge Wellness is now a wholly owned subsidiary; shares credited as per terms.

news.title: ICICI Securities issues a Buy report on FSN E-Commerce; CMP 277.05.
news.summary: ICICI Securities issues a Buy report on FSN E-Commerce; CMP 277.05.

news.title:
Nykaa shares surged over 4% after its Q3 results.
Hitachi Energy hit a 10% upper circuit post Q3 results.
news.summary:
Nykaa shares surged over 4% after its Q3 results.
Hitachi Energy hit a 10% upper circuit post Q3 results.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley retains 'Overweight' rating on Nykaa, raises target price to Rs 286.
The revised target reflects a positive outlook for FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley retains 'Overweight' rating on Nykaa, raises target price to Rs 286.
The revised target reflects a positive outlook for FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd.

news.title:
Nykaa reports 8% EBITDA margin, up 63% YoY, its highest to date.
Company confident about long-term EBITDA growth despite margin challenges.
news.summary:
Nykaa reports 8% EBITDA margin, up 63% YoY, its highest to date.
Company confident about long-term EBITDA growth despite margin challenges.

news.title:
Nomura upgrades Nykaa to 'buy' with a target price of ₹305/share.
The upgrade cites sustained growth and margin improvements in BPC and Fashion segments.
news.summary:
Nomura upgrades Nykaa to 'buy' with a target price of ₹305/share.
The upgrade cites sustained growth and margin improvements in BPC and Fashion segments.

news.title:
Stocks in focus: Tata Steel, Hero MotoCorp, Bharti Airtel, RIL, Nykaa.
Analysts suggest buying on dips if Nifty holds above 25,400 with upside to 26,000.
news.summary:
Stocks in focus: Tata Steel, Hero MotoCorp, Bharti Airtel, RIL, Nykaa.
Analysts suggest buying on dips if Nifty holds above 25,400 with upside to 26,000.

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce reports 28% GMV growth to Rs. 5,795 crore.
The company focuses on strategic expansion with a Nike partnership.
news.summary:
FSN E-Commerce reports 28% GMV growth to Rs. 5,795 crore.
The company focuses on strategic expansion with a Nike partnership.

news.title:
Nykaa Q3 results show net profit more than doubling to Rs 63 crore, revenue rising 27% YoY to Rs 2,873 crore.
EBITDA surged 63.2% YoY to Rs 230 crore, margins expanded to 8%; stock closed 4.1% higher at Rs 261.45 on NSE.
news.summary:
Nykaa Q3 results show net profit more than doubling to Rs 63 crore, revenue rising 27% YoY to Rs 2,873 crore.
EBITDA surged 63.2% YoY to Rs 230 crore, margins expanded to 8%; stock closed 4.1% higher at Rs 261.45 on NSE.

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd's board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue from operations reached Rs. 2,873.3 crore with net profit after tax at Rs. 67.7 crore. Exceptional items impacted results by Rs. 16.4 crore.
news.summary:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd's board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue from operations reached Rs. 2,873.3 crore with net profit after tax at Rs. 67.7 crore. Exceptional items impacted results by Rs. 16.4 crore.

news.title:
Nifty stocks Trent, Bharti Airtel, and Max Healthcare are in focus for Q3 results.
Earnings updates include Tata Motors, LIC, Nykaa, Suzlon, Hero MotoCorp, and others.
news.summary:
Nifty stocks Trent, Bharti Airtel, and Max Healthcare are in focus for Q3 results.

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures (Nykaa) announces participation in multiple investor meetings in Feb 2026.
Scheduled conferences include Nuvama, Axis Capital, Kotak, and IIFL in Mumbai, all in physical mode.
news.summary:

Scheduled conferences include Nuvama, Axis Capital, Kotak, and IIFL in Mumbai, all in physical mode.

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures executed a block trade on NSE for ~3.4M shares at Rs. 238.85.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 82.1 crores.
news.summary:

Nykaa witnessed a large trade of 3.7M shares valued at Rs 88 Cr.
The shares were traded at Rs 238.85 each, representing 0.13% equity.

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures' board will meet on Feb 5, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window remains closed from Dec 25, 2025, to Feb 7, 2026, per regulatory requirements.
news.summary:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures' board will meet on Feb 5, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window remains closed from Dec 25, 2025, to Feb 7, 2026, per regulatory requirements.

news.title:
JM Financial forecasts strong Q3FY26 for Paytm, Delhivery, Nykaa, and Eternal, with Buy ratings and target prices of Rs 1,810, Rs 570, Rs 325, and Rs 400, respectively.
Weaker performance expected for Swiggy and Nazara; Swiggy faces monetisation challenges, Nazara hit by seasonality and regulatory issues. Target prices: Rs 400, Rs 280.
news.summary:
JM Financial forecasts strong Q3FY26 for Paytm, Delhivery, Nykaa, and Eternal, with Buy ratings and target prices of Rs 1,810, Rs 570, Rs 325, and Rs 400, respectively.
Weaker performance expected for Swiggy and Nazara; Swiggy faces monetisation challenges, Nazara hit by seasonality and regulatory issues. Target prices: Rs 400, Rs 280.
